heading: About Me
bio: Data Science graduate with a strong background in statistical analysis, predictive modeling, and data visualization. Proficient in Python, R, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, and dashboard development, with hands-on experience analyzing large datasets, automating workflows, and improving decision-making in finance, cybersecurity, and business operations. Proven ability to streamline processes, enhance data accuracy, and deliver clear, actionable insights. Experienced project lead with strong communication, problem-solving, and collaboration skills.
